---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for MineMover
title: "[FEATURE]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Detailed Description
Describe the solution you'd like in detail. How should it work?

## Use Case
Describe the scenario where this feature would be useful:
- Who would use this feature?
- When would they use it?
- How would it improve their workflow?

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Priority
How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] Low - Nice to have
- [ ] Medium - Would improve workflow
- [ ] High - Significantly needed

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.
